element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player begins with limited resources and must learn basic tactical deployment
Geoscape layer introduces threat management; player learns to respond to alien activity
Turn-based tactics become core loop; player learns squad positioning and cover
Research unlock system reveals enemy capabilities progressively
Escalating enemy variety and intelligence demands strategic adaptation
Revealed as primary threat; forces player to understand enemy hierarchy

element_introduction_order.element: Cydonia base and final assault preparation
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Mars-based final mission; player must synthesize all learned tactics and technology

typical_relief_triggers: Completing Battlescape mission with minimal casualties
Monthly funding increase or stable council relations
Safe return to base after tactical deployment
typical_tension_triggers: Government funding threats or base attacks
Failed interception or terror attacks on cities
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Dual-layer rhythm: macro-level tension from real-time Geoscape threats punctuated by turn-based Battlescape micro-tension; escalating alien activity creates mounting pressure across campaign duration

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Black market alien artifact sales suggest exploration for salvageable items; optional base expansion locations across globe

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces conventional warfare; limited alien contact; player learns base management and aircraft interception with manageable threat level
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating alien variety and mutations appear; funding nations demand increased mission success; strategic choices multiply
difficulty_curve.late_game: Ethereals and advanced mind control abilities revealed; final assault on Mars base requires mastery of all accumulated knowledge and resources
notable_spikes: First major UFO interception forcing unscripted Battlescape encounter
Introduction of new advanced alien species types
Government funding reduction due to terror attacks or poor performance

notable_level_patterns.description: Player intercepts UFO on Geoscape, triggers Battlescape tactical mission to investigate wreckage and neutralize aliens; salvage alien artifacts for research/profit
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any UFO crash site ground mission

notable_level_patterns.description: Player discovers alien base location through Geoscape, must mount tactical assault via Battlescape; reveals alien infrastructure and strategic capabilities
Aliens conduct terror attack on city; Geoscape alerts player to location; Battlescape mission requires clearing aliens from populated area before government withdraws funding
Endgame mission requiring full player preparation; must attack alien command base with elite squad; defeat Alien Brain biocomputer to achieve victory
